# Pritam Bag — Portfolio

> Software Development Engineer based in Kolkata, West Bengal, India.
> Specialist in Laravel, PHP, React, and backend systems architecture.
> 1.5+ years building production software at Rxefy Tech and Iquester Solutions LLP.

## About

Pritam Bag is a Software Development Engineer with expertise in Laravel backend systems,
WordPress/WooCommerce customization, Dolibarr ERP, and React frontends. He holds an MCA
from Techno India Hooghly (CGPA 8.71) and a B.Sc in Mathematics from Barasat College (CGPA 9.10).

Currently working at Iquester Solutions LLP on ERP systems, multi-vendor platforms, and custom Laravel packages.

## Skills

- Backend: Laravel, PHP, REST APIs, Jobs & Queues
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS
- Database: MySQL, MariaDB
- Platforms: WordPress, WooCommerce, Dokan, Dolibarr
- Tools: Docker, Git, cPanel, VPS
- Integrations: Zoho Books, WhatsApp API, Messenger API

## Notable Work

- Built 5+ reusable Laravel packages including iquesters/user-management (published on Packagist)
- Designed an event-driven worker system using Laravel Jobs and Queues
- Built a UI-driven database schema builder inside a production application
- Contributed to Wrappid, an open-source React-based application framework
- Integrated Zoho Books, WhatsApp, and Messenger APIs into business workflows
- Customized Dolibarr ERP with templates, modules, and hosting migrations
- Built multi-vendor marketplace features on WordPress with Dokan and WooCommerce

## Blog

- "Your Laravel App Keeps Growing Columns. WordPress Solved This 15 Years Ago." — architecture post on the Entity-Meta database pattern, pivot tables, and vertical scaling
